auth.label: API Token
auth.description: TextIt API token used with the Authorization: Token <token> header. Sign in and open the official API Explorer linked from https://textit.com/api/v2/ to view or test API requests.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create a TextIt contact with optional URNs, groups, language, and fields.

name.description: The full name of the contact.

language.description: The preferred language for the contact as a 3 letter ISO code.

urns.description: URNs to associate with the contact.

groups.description: Group UUIDs this contact should belong to.

fields.description: TextIt contact field values keyed by contact field key.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a TextIt contact.

anyOf.description: The contact name.

status.description: The contact status returned by TextIt.

anyOf.description: The preferred language for the contact.

urns.description: The URNs associated with the contact.

groups.description: The groups this contact belongs to.

fields.description: TextIt contact field values keyed by contact field key.

anyOf.description: A TextIt flow reference.

modified_on.description: When the contact was last modified.

anyOf.description: When the contact last communicated.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a TextIt group.

anyOf.description: The smart group query, or null for manual groups.

status.description: The group status returned by TextIt.

system.description: Whether this is a system group.

count.description: The number of contacts in the group.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete a TextIt contact by UUID or URN.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for selecting a TextIt contact by UUID or URN. Provide exactly one of uuid or urn.

outputSchema.description: Deletion status for a TextIt resource.

actions.name: delete_group
actions.description: Delete a TextIt contact group by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for selecting a TextIt group.

outputSchema.description: Deletion status for a TextIt resource.

actions.name: get_workspace
actions.description: Get the current TextIt workspace details for the API token.

actions.name: list_broadcasts
actions.description: List TextIt broadcasts with optional UUID, date, and cursor filters.

before.description: Return broadcasts created before this datetime.

after.description: Return broadcasts created after this datetime.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous TextIt response.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass as cursor on the next request, or null when there is no next page.
The cursor to pass as cursor for the previous page, or null when there is no previous page.

urns.description: The URNs that received the broadcast.

contacts.description: The contacts that received the broadcast.

groups.description: The groups that received the broadcast.

text.description: Message text translations keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

additionalProperties.description: Attachment media UUIDs for one language.

attachments.description: Attachment media UUIDs keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

quick_replies.description: Quick replies keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

status.description: The broadcast status returned by TextIt.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List TextIt contacts with optional UUID, URN, group, date, and cursor filters.

group.description: Filter by group name or UUID.

before.description: Return contacts modified before this datetime.

after.description: Return contacts modified after this datetime.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous TextIt response.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass as cursor on the next request, or null when there is no next page.
The cursor to pass as cursor for the previous page, or null when there is no previous page.
The contact name.

status.description: The contact status returned by TextIt.

anyOf.description: The preferred language for the contact.

urns.description: The URNs associated with the contact.

groups.description: The groups this contact belongs to.

fields.description: TextIt contact field values keyed by contact field key.

anyOf.description: A TextIt flow reference.

modified_on.description: When the contact was last modified.

anyOf.description: When the contact last communicated.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List TextIt contact groups with optional filters.

manualOnly.description: Whether to only return manual groups.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous TextIt response.

inputSchema.description: Filters for listing TextIt contact groups.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass as cursor on the next request, or null when there is no next page.
The cursor to pass as cursor for the previous page, or null when there is no previous page.
The smart group query, or null for manual groups.

status.description: The group status returned by TextIt.

system.description: Whether this is a system group.

count.description: The number of contacts in the group.

outputSchema.description: A page of TextIt contact groups.

actions.name: list_messages
actions.description: List TextIt messages with optional folder, UUID, date, and cursor filters.

before.description: Return messages created before this datetime.

after.description: Return messages created after this datetime.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous TextIt response.

anyOf.description: The cursor to pass as cursor on the next request, or null when there is no next page.
The cursor to pass as cursor for the previous page, or null when there is no previous page.

urn.description: The sender or receiver URN for the message.

channel.description: The TextIt channel that handled the message.

direction.description: The message direction returned by TextIt.

status.description: The message status returned by TextIt.

visibility.description: The message visibility returned by TextIt.

attachments.description: The message attachments returned by TextIt.

quick_replies.description: The message quick replies returned by TextIt.

labels.description: The message labels returned by TextIt.

anyOf.description: A TextIt flow reference.

created_on.description: When the message was created or received.

anyOf.description: When the message was sent.

modified_on.description: When the message was last modified.

actions.name: send_broadcast
actions.description: Create and send a TextIt broadcast to URNs, contacts, or groups.

contacts.description: Recipient contact UUIDs for the broadcast.

groups.description: Recipient group UUIDs for the broadcast.

text.description: Message text translations keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

additionalProperties.description: Attachment media UUIDs for one language.

attachments.description: Attachment media UUIDs keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

quick_replies.description: Quick replies keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

base_language.description: The default translation language as an ISO-639-3 code.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating and sending a TextIt broadcast. Provide at least one of urns, contacts, or groups.

urns.description: The URNs that received the broadcast.

contacts.description: The contacts that received the broadcast.

groups.description: The groups that received the broadcast.

text.description: Message text translations keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

additionalProperties.description: Attachment media UUIDs for one language.

attachments.description: Attachment media UUIDs keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

quick_replies.description: Quick replies keyed by ISO-639-3 language code.

status.description: The broadcast status returned by TextIt.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a TextIt message to a single contact.

contact.description: The UUID of the contact to message.

attachments.description: TextIt media object UUIDs to attach.

quick_replies.description: Quick replies to include with the message.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for sending a TextIt message to one contact.

urn.description: The sender or receiver URN for the message.

channel.description: The TextIt channel that handled the message.

direction.description: The message direction returned by TextIt.

status.description: The message status returned by TextIt.

visibility.description: The message visibility returned by TextIt.

attachments.description: The message attachments returned by TextIt.

quick_replies.description: The message quick replies returned by TextIt.

labels.description: The message labels returned by TextIt.

anyOf.description: A TextIt flow reference.

created_on.description: When the message was created or received.

anyOf.description: When the message was sent.

modified_on.description: When the message was last modified.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update a TextIt contact by UUID or URN.

name.description: The full name of the contact.

language.description: The preferred language for the contact as a 3 letter ISO code.

urns.description: URNs to associate with the contact.

groups.description: Group UUIDs this contact should belong to.

fields.description: TextIt contact field values keyed by contact field key.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for updating a TextIt contact by UUID or URN. Provide exactly one of uuid or urn, and at least one contact field to update.

anyOf.description: The contact name.

status.description: The contact status returned by TextIt.

anyOf.description: The preferred language for the contact.

urns.description: The URNs associated with the contact.

groups.description: The groups this contact belongs to.

fields.description: TextIt contact field values keyed by contact field key.

anyOf.description: A TextIt flow reference.

modified_on.description: When the contact was last modified.

anyOf.description: When the contact last communicated.

actions.name: update_group
actions.description: Update a TextIt contact group name.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for updating a TextIt group.

anyOf.description: The smart group query, or null for manual groups.

status.description: The group status returned by TextIt.

system.description: Whether this is a system group.

count.description: The number of contacts in the group.
